meta.siteDescription: Educational Physics simulator platform for Unidad Educativa Treinta de Septiembre students.

hero.title: Physics simulators for exploring, measuring and understanding
hero.subtitle: A modular educational platform where each physics phenomenon has its own clear, interactive and expandable space.

catalog.title: Available simulators
catalog.description: Cards are generated from data/simulators.json. To add new topics, create a folder, add a data entry and include translated text.

about.title: Built as a platform, not as a single isolated page
about.body: Each simulator has its own URL with independent HTML, CSS, JavaScript and assets. The main catalog only reads data and translations, so the project can grow without editing the central code.

credits.line3: for the students of Unidad Educativa Treinta de Septiembre.

footer.forkTitle: Fork it and build your own version of the lab
footer.forkBody: This project is published on GitHub so teachers, students and developers can study it, adapt it and expand it with new simulators.
footer.forkCta: View the GitHub repository and create a fork

hooke.title: Hooke's Law
hooke.description: Explore how a mass stretches a spring or dynamometer depending on the spring constant and gravity.
hooke.intro: Change mass, gravity and spring constant k to observe applied force and spring elongation.
hooke.variables: Mass, gravity, force, spring constant k and elongation.
hooke.results: Observe force, stretching, spring animation and experiment table.
hooke.formula: Applied relationship: F = kx, with F = mg.
hooke.use: Helps students understand proportionality between force and deformation in elastic materials.

movimiento-parabolico.title: Projectile Motion
movimiento-parabolico.description: Simulate launches with initial velocity, angle and gravity to analyze trajectory, range and maximum height.
movimiento-parabolico.intro: Adjust initial velocity, angle, gravity and simulation speed to compare projectile motion trials.
movimiento-parabolico.variables: Initial velocity, launch angle and gravity.
movimiento-parabolico.results: Observe trajectory, graphs, velocity components, maximum height, range and flight time.
movimiento-parabolico.formula: Applied concepts: uniform horizontal motion and uniformly accelerated vertical motion.
movimiento-parabolico.use: Connects velocity vectors, gravity and position during a launch.
